scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/worker run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace packages/database run build && npm --workspace packages/ai-providers run build && npm --workspace packages/storage run build && npm --workspace packages/payments run build && npm --workspace packages/safety run build && npm --workspace packages/queue run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace packages/database run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/database run build && npm --workspace packages/ai-providers run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/ai-providers run build && npm --workspace packages/storage run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/storage run build && npm --workspace packages/payments run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/payments run build && npm --workspace packages/safety run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/safety run build && npm --workspace packages/queue run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/queue run build && npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/worker run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/worker run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
